title: schizaeaceae
intro: The taxonomical rank of Schizaeaceae is a family of plants, specifically a group of ferns that belong to the order Polypodiales. It comprises about 70 species of ferns, commonly known as water clovers or schizaeas, which are mostly found in aquatic environments. Members of the Schizaeaceae family are characterized by their simple or compound leaves and often, submerged or floating habits. Schizaeaceae is one of the oldest known families of ferns, with fossil records dating back to the Early Cretaceous period.
